reference: ZAU AL MAKAN BOWED HIS HEAD AWHILE AND THEN SAID I ACCEPT THIS POSITION FOR INDEED THERE WAS NO REFUSING AND HE WAS CERTIFIED THAT THE CHAMBERLAIN HAD COUNSELLED HIM WELL AND WISELY AND SET HIM ON THE RIGHT WAY
text: Zaw Makkan bowed his head a while, and then said, "I accept the position." For indeed, there was no refusing, and he was certified that the chamberlain had counselled him well and wisely, and set him on the right way.
